assumptions: No Pinecone account, API key, index, or records are assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

developer_goal: Create a Pinecone account and API key on Starter (or equivalent), create an integrated embedding index, upsert sample text, and receive search hits over HTTPS.

first_success.outcome: After cURL create-for-model and upsert text, a cURL search with text against the index host returns result.hits.
first_success.observable_signal: POST .../records/namespaces/{namespace}/search returns JSON with result.hits containing matching record ids and fields.

route_selection.surface: Integrated embedding index via cURL (API key + Starter plan)
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Integrated embedding index via cURL (API key + Starter plan)

candidates.name: Integrated embedding index via cURL (API key + Starter plan)
candidates.reason: Pinecone documents REST cURL for create-for-model, upsert text, and search with text. The general Quickstart requires an account/API key and offers Starter (free) among plans. An SDK install is not required when using the documented HTTP paths.

required_path.action: Sign up for Pinecone at app.pinecone.io and choose a plan (Starter free, or Builder / Standard trial).
required_path.observable_result: Console shows the account and plan.

required_path.action: Confirm Starter (free) capacity is sufficient, or activate Builder / Standard trial credits if choosing a paid path.
required_path.observable_result: Console shows an active plan that can create indexes.

required_path.action: Create or copy a Pinecone API key and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The key value is available locally.
The environment variable is set for the current shell.

required_path.action: Create an integrated embedding index with cURL POST to https://api.pinecone.io/indexes/create-for-model.
required_path.observable_result: create-for-model returns index metadata including host.

required_path.action: Upsert sample text with cURL to https://$INDEX_HOST/records/namespaces/$NAMESPACE/upsert.
Search with text via cURL POST to https://$INDEX_HOST/records/namespaces/$NAMESPACE/search and confirm hits.

prerequisites.description: A Pinecone account that can open the console and create API keys.
A selected plan with capacity for a serverless integrated index. Starter is free with limits; Builder and Standard trial are paid/credit alternatives documented on the Quickstart.
A Pinecone API key sent as Api-Key on control-plane and data-plane requests.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

excluded.item: Builder/Standard paid upgrades beyond Starter first success

sources.title: Create an index with integrated embedding

uncertainties.question: Whether every Starter signup still auto-surfaces an API key without a separate key-creation screen.
uncertainties.impact: Credential step may be one or two console clicks.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Quickstart says you receive a key after signup and also documents creating a new key in console.
